bead.title: prompts: prompt_sha in manifest.json + render-size CI fixture
bead.description: Add prompt_sha hash to manifest.json so attempts can be sliced by prompt version. Add a render-size CI fixture that fails if prompt size grows unexpectedly.
bead.acceptance: 1. manifest.json includes prompt_sha. 2. CI fixture asserts size budget. 3. resolver_feat008 efficacy view can slice by prompt_sha.
